svg.title: ShoreShield Intelligence Engine — complete build roadmap

svg.text: Layer 3 — AI classification (this is your core AI/ML work)

svg.text: Cut completely — these are feature fest, not your signature
How to describe this for Oxford / research applications

g.text: Built an AI-assisted coastal hazard intelligence pipeline
fusing crowdsourced + social signals into confidence-ranked coastal alerts
Focused on event fusion and uncertainty estimation
not map-heavy visualization — applied marine AI for decision support

svg.text: Click any box to go deeper on that module.
Start with Layer 3 (AI classification) — that's where your ML knowledge actually shows.
Everything else is plumbing. That box is the signal.
